summary: Iteration 32 - Complete testing of branch separation functionality in multi-tenant restaurant management system. All features verified: BranchSelector component in POS, tables/orders/drivers filtering by branch_id, Branch 1 shows 5 tables, Branch 2 shows 0 tables.
passed_tests: Login as GRaffiti admin (hanialdujaili@gmail.com / graffiti123) - successful
GET /api/tables?branch_id=Branch2 returns 0 tables - branch separation working
GET /api/orders filtering by branch_id works correctly
GET /api/drivers filtering by branch_id works correctly
BranchSelector component visible in POS page header
BranchSelector dropdown shows: جميع الفروع, Branch 1, Branch 2
Selecting Branch 2 shows 0 table buttons - (0 طاولة)
Branch selection persists and updates tables display
Frontend loads correctly with GRaffiti burger branding

branch_selector_in_pos.location: POS page header, next to 'نقاط البيع' title

pos_data_refresh_on_branch_change.behavior: Tables and drivers update when branch selection changes

critical_code_review_comments: BranchSelector component correctly integrated in POS.js header
fetchData() and fetchPendingOrders() correctly use getBranchIdForApi() for branch filtering
Tables API correctly filters by branch_id parameter
Drivers API correctly filters by branch_id parameter
Orders API correctly filters by branch_id parameter
Branch context (BranchContext.js) properly manages selected branch state
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_branch_separation.py - Created comprehensive test suite for branch separation
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. Using existing branches and tables.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 32 completed successfully. Branch separation feature fully verified: 1) BranchSelector component appears in POS header with data-testid='branch-selector', 2) Dropdown shows 3 options: جميع الفروع, Branch 1, Branch 2, 3) Branch 1 has 5 tables (numbers 1-5), Branch 2 has 0 tables, 4) Tables/orders/drivers APIs correctly filter by branch_id parameter, 5) POS page refreshes data when branch selection changes. All backend tests (15/15) passed. Frontend UI tests via Playwright confirmed branch switching works correctly.
